A A L| B R A Updated Wednesday 26 January 2022
Shisseing tienited 3 & Syrs inc scrubber & eco tonnage
WET TIME CHARTER ESTIMATES (S/pdpr)
SIZE 1 YR 2 YR 3 YR 5 YR
HANDY = 12,500 = 12,750 = 14,500 f 14,250
MR IMO3 v 12,000 vw 13,250 Y 16,000 Vv 15,750
LRI 1 14,500 = 15,250 17,500 mS 17,250
LR2 = 16,500 = 19,000 = 26,000 os 25,750
AFRA = 16,000 = 18,500 = 25,000 a 25,000
SUEZ > 19,500 > 21,000 = 29,000 = 27,000
VLCC Y 21,750 ‘VY 24,500 VY 34,500 wy, 34,500
